changes.content:
# Agent Fox Technical Core V1A-3I

Mission `ENG-20260722-031254-A5232E` integrates the verified shared self-knowledge adapter into the Desktop `FoxAIApp.send_message` route only. Recognized, clarification, and evidence-error results bypass Director, specialist, provider, and model dispatch. Unsupported ordinary chat continues through the original Desktop route unchanged. The verified WebUI integration is not modified.

changes.new:
if not text:
            return "break"

        # FOXAI_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_DESKTOP_V1A3I_BEGIN
        try:
            import importlib.util as _foxai_sk_importlib_util
            from pathlib import Path as _foxai_sk_Path
            _foxai_sk_module = getattr(self, "_foxai_self_knowledge_desktop_module", None)
            if _foxai_sk_module is None:
                _foxai_sk_path = _foxai_sk_Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\desktop_self_knowledge_integration_v1.py")
                _foxai_sk_spec = _foxai_sk_importlib_util.spec_from_file_location("foxai_desktop_self_knowledge_integration_v1", _foxai_sk_path)
                if _foxai_sk_spec is None or _foxai_sk_spec.loader is None:
                    raise RuntimeError("desktop self-knowledge integration loader unavailable")
                _foxai_sk_module = _foxai_sk_importlib_util.module_from_spec(_foxai_sk_spec)
                _foxai_sk_spec.loader.exec_module(_foxai_sk_module)
                setattr(self, "_foxai_self_knowledge_desktop_module", _foxai_sk_module)
            _foxai_sk_reply = _foxai_sk_module.route_desktop_message(text)
        except Exception:
            _foxai_sk_reply = {"intercepted": False, "status": "adapter_unavailable", "answer_text": None}
        if isinstance(_foxai_sk_reply, dict) and _foxai_sk_reply.get("intercepted") is True:
            _foxai_sk_status = str(_foxai_sk_reply.get("status") or "")
            _foxai_sk_answer = str(_foxai_sk_reply.get("answer_text") or "").strip()
            if _foxai_sk_status not in {"answered", "clarification_required", "evidence_error"} or not _foxai_sk_answer:
                _foxai_sk_status = "evidence_error"
                _foxai_sk_answer = "Agent Fox self-knowledge evidence could not be safely validated."
            self.input_box.delete("1.0", "end")
            self.add_chat("ERIC", text)
            self.messages.append({"role": "user", "content": text})
            self.add_chat("AGENT FOX", _foxai_sk_answer)
            self.messages.append({"role": "assistant", "content": _foxai_sk_answer})
            self.mission_memory.save()
            self.status.set("ONLINE")
            return "break"
        # FOXAI_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_DESKTOP_V1A3I_END
        self.mission_status("Receiving request...\n\nDirector analyzing mission parameters.")

intent: Correct only the one-byte Desktop seam boundary defect from rolled-back V1A-3I while preserving the exact support payloads, insertion logic, 36-case routing behavior, eight evidence outputs, and verified WebUI isolation.
rollback_boundary: Restore only ui/main_window.py from the Workshop snapshot and remove the same three new V1A-3I support files plus the V1A-3I-R1 evidence output directory. Preserve the verified WebUI integration, prior Technical Core evidence, runtimes, databases, Writer, Study, Hanger Bay, Repair Bay, Engineering Workshop, and K:.
title: Agent Fox Technical Core V1A-3I-R1 — Desktop Seam Boundary Reconstruction Repair

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib,json
source=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\ui\main_window.py"); raw=source.read_bytes(); text=raw.decode("utf-8"); compile(text,str(source),"exec")
assert len(raw)==99077 and hashlib.sha256(raw).hexdigest()=="a9c5bb86878e5f0cd27d221dbb32688b337e6026073a4b66d83339e0aef294a3"
begin=b"        # FOXAI_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_DESKTOP_V1A3I_BEGIN\n"; end=b"        # FOXAI_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_DESKTOP_V1A3I_END\n"
assert raw.count(begin)==1 and raw.count(end)==1
start=raw.index(begin); finish=raw.index(end,start)+len(end); seam=raw[start:finish]
assert len(seam)==2194 and hashlib.sha256(seam).hexdigest()=="0dd2a54415e29ca4b0cf6edc1d8ee8c00a870dd9359066b9295d486cea78aa6e"
base=raw[:start]+raw[finish:]
assert len(base)==96883 and hashlib.sha256(base).hexdigest()=="cd20a1785a574eae44e290c1af1c1da7ac2bb66559f7d9ce8e93a9b2d6516b36"
checks={
 r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\desktop_self_knowledge_integration_v1.py":(32524,"e420706136b4902d82d8dbf1fecc64ae70fb8bc639106db41033545f8c196c30"),
 r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\DESKTOP_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_INTEGRATION_CONTRACT_V1.json":(1148,"51603dbe60da228666b39ce88a4c47651bd3fd54e771278926ebaef38a2f0f7a"),
 r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\README_V1A3I.md":(422,"1151d297dd8c85fbc79c4a1548c5d7cffc3e10908cacdd451d3e8681201d5946"),
 r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\self_knowledge_chat_adapter_v1.py":(None,"a80a9047e0eebd9ac87fe4d656c565bc6534563bb3c97e1ad9b59823a36804f7"),
 r"Z:\FOXAI\core\foxai_web.py":(None,"d7bf0a2042d55ef7f0a5869556015e42c7427e7ff88636b28e1795f3adf7b952"),
}
for name,(size,digest) in checks.items():
 p=Path(name); data=p.read_bytes(); assert size is None or len(data)==size,(name,len(data)); assert hashlib.sha256(data).hexdigest()==digest,name
snapshot=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\snapshots\ENG-20260722-033815-E44379"); manifests=sorted(snapshot.glob("snapshot_*.manifest.json")); assert manifests
manifest=json.loads(manifests[-1].read_text(encoding="utf-8")); expected=["System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore/DESKTOP_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_INTEGRATION_CONTRACT_V1.json","System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore/README_V1A3I.md","System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore/desktop_self_knowledge_integration_v1.py","ui/main_window.py"]
assert sorted(row["relative_path"] for row in manifest["entries"])==expected
source_entry=next(row for row in manifest["entries"] if row["relative_path"]=="ui/main_window.py")
assert source_entry["existed"] is True and source_entry["sha256"]=="cd20a1785a574eae44e290c1af1c1da7ac2bb66559f7d9ce8e93a9b2d6516b36" and source_entry["size_bytes"]==96883
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A3I_R1_PRECONDITIONS_AND_PATCH_OK")
validations.name: Verify corrected Desktop postimage, exact preimage reconstruction, support hashes, adapter, WebUI isolation, and snapshot
Run isolated Desktop translation component self-test
Execute exact inserted Desktop seam and build the deterministic 36-case evidence set
Validate exact eight LF-only evidence outputs and recorded hashes

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import ast,hashlib,json
source=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\ui\main_window.py"); raw=source.read_bytes(); tree=ast.parse(raw.decode("utf-8"))
assert len(raw)==99077 and hashlib.sha256(raw).hexdigest()=="a9c5bb86878e5f0cd27d221dbb32688b337e6026073a4b66d83339e0aef294a3"
begin=b"        # FOXAI_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_DESKTOP_V1A3I_BEGIN\n"; end=b"        # FOXAI_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_DESKTOP_V1A3I_END\n"; start=raw.index(begin); finish=raw.index(end,start)+len(end)
assert raw.count(begin)==1 and raw.count(end)==1
assert hashlib.sha256(raw[start:finish]).hexdigest()=="0dd2a54415e29ca4b0cf6edc1d8ee8c00a870dd9359066b9295d486cea78aa6e"
base=raw[:start]+raw[finish:]; assert hashlib.sha256(base).hexdigest()=="cd20a1785a574eae44e290c1af1c1da7ac2bb66559f7d9ce8e93a9b2d6516b36" and len(base)==96883
funcs=[n for n in ast.walk(tree) if isinstance(n,(ast.FunctionDef,ast.AsyncFunctionDef)) and n.name=="send_message"]
assert len(funcs)==1 and funcs[0].lineno==2146
assert raw[:start].count(b"\n")+1 > 2146 and raw[:start].count(b"\n")+1 < 2206
assert raw[finish:finish+27]==b"        self.mission_status"
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A3I_R1_EXACT_SEAM_AND_SOURCE_STRUCTURE_OK")
validations.name: Verify corrected seam boundary, exact source syntax, one marker pair, and byte-perfect preimage reconstruction

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import json
out=Path(r"Z:/FOXAI/System/EngineeringWorkshop/missions/ENG-20260722-033815-E44379_V1A3I_DESKTOP_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_INTEGRATION")
matrix=json.loads((out/"DESKTOP_INTEGRATION_TEST_MATRIX.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8")); bypass=json.loads((out/"DESKTOP_MODEL_BYPASS_EVIDENCE.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8")); preservation=json.loads((out/"DESKTOP_ORDINARY_CHAT_PRESERVATION.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8")); coverage=json.loads((out/"DESKTOP_INTEGRATION_COVERAGE.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8")); patch=json.loads((out/"DESKTOP_CHAT_ROUTE_PATCH_MAP.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert patch["post_sha256"]=="a9c5bb86878e5f0cd27d221dbb32688b337e6026073a4b66d83339e0aef294a3" and patch["post_size_bytes"]==99077
assert patch["reconstructed_pre_sha256"]=="cd20a1785a574eae44e290c1af1c1da7ac2bb66559f7d9ce8e93a9b2d6516b36" and patch["reconstructed_pre_size_bytes"]==96883
assert matrix["test_count"]==36 and matrix["all_passed"] is True
assert matrix["counts"]=={"adapter_unavailable_count":2,"ambiguous_count":4,"empty_count":1,"evidence_corruption_count":1,"malformed_count":1,"ordinary_count":12,"recognized_count":11,"unsupported_technical_count":4}
for key in ("director_calls_for_handled","specialist_calls_for_handled","get_ai_response_calls_for_handled","model_thread_calls_for_handled","provider_calls_for_handled","model_calls_for_handled"):
 assert bypass[key]==0
assert preservation["original_route_exactly_once"] is True and preservation["registry_reads_for_unsupported_chat"]==0
assert coverage["workshop_python_alias_resolved"] is False and coverage["pythonw_identity_directly_probed"] is False and coverage["runtime_facts_inferred_across_contexts"] is False
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A3I_R1_ROUTING_AND_SAFETY_TESTS_OK")
validations.name: Validate all 36 routing cases, model bypass, pass-through, and uncertainty preservation
Prove verified WebUI and unrelated Desktop sources remained outside the change set

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import json
out=Path(r"Z:/FOXAI/System/EngineeringWorkshop/missions/ENG-20260722-033815-E44379_V1A3I_DESKTOP_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_INTEGRATION"); names=set(['DESKTOP_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_INTEGRATION_CONTRACT.json', 'DESKTOP_CHAT_ROUTE_PATCH_MAP.json', 'DESKTOP_RESPONSE_COMPATIBILITY.json', 'DESKTOP_INTEGRATION_TEST_MATRIX.json', 'DESKTOP_MODEL_BYPASS_EVIDENCE.json', 'DESKTOP_ORDINARY_CHAT_PRESERVATION.json', 'DESKTOP_INTEGRATION_COVERAGE.json', 'DESKTOP_INTEGRATION_RECEIPT.json']); actual={p.name for p in out.iterdir() if p.is_file()}; assert actual==names
assert sum(p.stat().st_size for p in out.iterdir())<8388608
for p in out.iterdir(): assert b"\r" not in p.read_bytes()
receipt=json.loads((out/"DESKTOP_INTEGRATION_RECEIPT.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8")); coverage=json.loads((out/"DESKTOP_INTEGRATION_COVERAGE.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
mission_plan=json.loads(Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\AGENT_FOX_V1A3I_R1\PLAN.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8")); assert mission_plan["safety"]["prior_failure_classification"]=="desktop_seam_trailing_newline_outside_removal_boundary" and mission_plan["safety"]["integration_behavior_changed"] is False
assert receipt["test_count"]==36 and receipt["exact_output_count_including_receipt"]==8
assert receipt["existing_live_source_files_modified"]==1 and receipt["webui_source_modified"] is False
for key in ("network_used","packages_installed","models_loaded","comfyui_launched","k_accessed"):
 assert receipt[key] is False and coverage[key] is False
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A3I_R1_EXACT_OUTPUTS_AND_BOUNDARIES_OK")
validations.name: Validate exact output count, byte canonicalization, size ceiling, and safety boundaries
